pending.body: finding_summary: Planning and `plan_and_implement` stage overrides can still silently drop the new scope guidance. `build_stage_prompt()` only computes the guidance block for those stages (`src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:166-174`), but stage templates still treat `classification_guidance` as optional (`src/contexts/workspace_governance/template_catalog.rs:406-413,766-774`). The new regression test explicitly accepts a `plan_and_implement.md` override that omits the placeholder (`tests/unit/prompt_builder_test.rs:655-704`), so any existing workspace/project override will continue generating scope-unaware prompts even when the bead task prompt contract is present. That misses the acceptance criterion that these stages receive scope-aware guidance whenever bead scope sections exist. severity: medium. affected_files: src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs, src/contexts/workspace_governance/template_catalog.rs, tests/unit/prompt_builder_test.rs. remediation_hint: require `{{classification_guidance}}` for planning-oriented overrides when the bead contract is active, or inject the scope guidance outside template-controlled content so overrides cannot suppress it.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 2 -> Plan and Implement
